tags.name: Interview
tags.description:
🤖 AI-Powered Conversational Interview Agent (v2)

**Breaking change from v1:** The interview system is now fully conversational — questions are served one-at-a-time and each answer is graded immediately.

**Old flow (removed):** POST /start (track) → answer all → POST /submit

**New flow:** POST /start (job_id) → loop { GET /question → POST /answer } → auto-complete → recruiter sees report → PATCH /decision

tags.name: Schedule
tags.description: Real Interview Scheduling (after passing AI interview)

Login and retrieve JWT
Verify 2FA OTP code and receive JWT
post.description:
Called after a successful password login. Submit the `otp_token` from the login
response and the 6-digit code sent to the user's email to receive the real JWT.

otp_token.description: The temporary token returned by POST /api/auth/login

code.description: The 6-digit code sent to the user's email

post.summary: Resend the 2FA OTP code
post.description:
Request a new 6-digit OTP code to be sent to the user's email. You must provide the
`otp_token` from the original login request. Returns a fresh 5-minute `otp_token`.

otp_token.description: The temporary token returned by POST /api/auth/login

post.summary: Request a password reset link via email

200.description: Reset link sent if email exists

put.summary: Reset password using token from email

get.description: Redirects the user to Google's consent screen. Open this URL directly in the browser — not via fetch/axios.

get.summary: Google OAuth callback
get.description: Google redirects here after user consents. Redirects to FRONTEND_URL/oauth-callback?token=...&newUser=true|false

get.summary: Initiate GitHub OAuth login
get.description: Redirects the user to GitHub's consent screen. Open this URL directly in the browser — not via fetch/axios.

get.description: GitHub redirects here after user consents. Redirects to FRONTEND_URL/oauth-callback?token=...&newUser=true|false

Start an AI interview for a job you applied to (Seeker only)
post.description:
Validates the seeker has applied to the job, maps to the AI platform's job,
starts a conversational session, and returns the first question immediately.

201.description: Interview started — returns interview_id and first question

400.description: Already have an active interview for this job

403.description: You haven't applied to this job

404.description: Job not found or not available in AI system

get.summary: Get the next question for an ongoing interview (Seeker only)

200.description: Next question object { id, question_type, content, options, difficulty }

get.summary: Get the AI report for a completed interview (Seeker or Recruiter)
get.description:
Returns the full AI grading report and all answers for a completed interview.
If the report wasn't saved at completion time (e.g. due to a network error),
this endpoint will attempt to re-fetch it from the AI system and save it.

200.description: Report object with total_score, answers, and full AI report

502.description: Report not yet available from AI system — try again shortly

post.summary: Submit one answer and receive immediate evaluation (Seeker only)
post.description:
Submits a single answer to the AI. Returns evaluation with score, feedback,
and AI-detection probability. If this was the last question (is_complete: true),
also returns the final report and notifies recruiters.

answer.example: I would use dependency injection to decouple components...

200.description: Evaluation result, next question (if any), and completion status

post.summary: Report a real-time cheating event (Seeker client)
post.description: Called by the frontend when suspicious behavior is detected (tab switch, copy-paste, etc.)

details.example: User switched to another tab for 5 seconds

get.summary: Get seeker's own interview history (paginated list)
Get full detail of one interview (with answers and report)
View all interview results for a seeker who applied to your jobs (Recruiter only)
get.description: Returns seeker profile + all their AI interviews for your company's jobs, including full answers and reports.

403.description: Seeker has not applied to your jobs

patch.summary: Make a pass/fail decision on a completed interview (Recruiter only)
patch.description:
Recruiter reviews the AI report and decides if the candidate advances.
- **passed**: Seeker notified, moves to scheduling stage
- **failed**: Seeker notified of rejection

get.summary: Stream the raw text of a question chunk-by-chunk (Seeker only)
get.description:
Proxies the AI platform's Server-Sent Events stream directly to the client.
The response is plain text delivered in chunks as the AI generates it.

parameters.name: questionId
parameters.description: Question ID returned by the /question endpoint

get.summary: Get 5 newest open jobs (for landing page)

get.description: Forwards the seeker's skills and bio to the AI Recommender Service, fetches full job details from the DB, and returns them ranked by the AI match score.

200.description: List of recommended jobs enriched with AI match scores, explanations, and matched skills

post.summary: Schedule a real interview for a seeker who passed the AI interview (Recruiter only)
post.description:
After reviewing the AI interview report and marking the seeker as "passed",
the recruiter schedules a real interview with a date, location/link, and optional notes.
The seeker is notified via in-app notification AND email.

interview_id.description: ID of the AI interview that was marked as "passed"

scheduled_at.description: Date and time of the real interview (ISO 8601)

location.description: Physical location or video call link

notes.description: Any additional notes for the seeker
notes.example: Please bring your portfolio. Interview is with the CTO.

201.description: Interview scheduled — seeker notified via app + email

400.description: Interview not in passed state / missing fields

409.description: Already scheduled or time conflict with existing schedule

patch.summary: Update a scheduled interview's date, location, or notes (Recruiter only)

delete.description: Marks the schedule as cancelled and sends notification + cancellation email to the seeker.

200.description: Schedule cancelled — seeker notified via app + email
